title: Advancement Plus - Vanilla
description: Enhanced and pretty hard-coded advancements for you to make your minecraft journey more purposeful.
body:
Welcome to Advancement Plus -  Vanilla. **Now on Modrinth !** 

This mod includes a diverse range of custom advancement and triggers

Note: This mod uses DataGenerator from ForgeAPI to generate advancement JSON files.

__For modpack creator and users__:  You always have the right to use my mod for modpack publishing, credit to me is highly recommended. Furthermore, you **can not** distribute this mod to anywhere rather than Curseforge and Modrinth or in any platform in any form.

Supported Minecraft / Forge Version : 1.18.1 / 39.0+ 

Supported Minecraft / Fabric Version: 1.18.1 / Not Implemented Yet

Wiki for all the advancements and custom criterion triggers: **Coming Soon**

Available Addons: **Mekanism (1.16.5 only)**
